'''''Falcon''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The ''Falcon'' was involved in the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] construction project.

The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] learned of the existence of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] repair facility (actually a converted [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]]) near [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] through the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Tuz]], and realized that its destruction would cripple the infrastructure that serviced the [[Starship/Legends|starships]] the Death Star's construction relied on. A pair of [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] from [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] was tasked with destroying the facility.

When the Rebel [[Attack on the Imperial repair dock|attack]] arrived, the ''Falcon'' was near the facility and attempted to assist in its defense. [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] destroyed the corvette with [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]], along with the [[TIE series/Legends|TIE starfighter]] defenses and protective [[Space mine/Legends|minefield]]. The arrival of the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] [[Vulture (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Vulture'']] proved too late to save the facility, which was destroyed by Farlander's wingleader, setting back the completion of the Death Star.

==Behind the scenes==
In the Windows version of ''X-Wing'', the ship is named as the ''Kato''.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]
